title: B3-PvP
description: A Simple Shader for Minecraft PvP
body:
# B3-PvP Shaderpack

A PvP-focused Minecraft shaderpack based on [Base-330](https://github.com/shaderlabs/Base-330), designed for competitive gameplay with enhanced visibility and performance.

## Features

### Lighting
- **Fullbright**: Removes shadows for maximum visibility

### Visual Effects
- **Motion Blur**: Camera motion blur effect (Lunar Client style) with adjustable strength (25-200%)
- **FXAA**: Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing for smoother edges
- **Vanilla Clouds**: Toggle cloud rendering with adjustable opacity (10-100%)

### Block Highlight
Custom block selection highlight (Lunar Client style):
- **Normal**: Vanilla black outline
- **RGB**: Solid color using Color 1
- **Rainbow**: Animated rainbow colors
- **Gradient**: 3D diagonal gradient from Color 1 to Color 2 with optional swirl animation

### Fog
- **No Fog**: Disable vanilla fog for clear visibility
- **Fog Density**: Adjustable fog intensity (1-100%)

### Water
- **Enhanced Water Rendering**: Brighter, more transparent water
  - 25% brightness boost
  - Turquoise tint for better underwater distinction
  - 50% transparency

### Sky
- Diagonal Sun/Moon: 45-degree rotated sun and moon

## Compatibility

- Works with **Iris** (recommended)
- **OptiFine**: Might work, but is not officially supported. Support requests for OptiFine are not allowed.
